final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 小红书 nine-grid poster (3列×3行) for a female-oriented healthy lifestyle / sleep-healing knowledge series, designed to be cut into 9 individual cards after export.

Style/medium: needs a clean, premium, ins风 治愈感 aesthetic with light quasi-material illustration accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a strict 3×3 nine-grid layout with clearly visible dividing lines or thin borders between all 9 cells; each cell must be self-contained and centered so no title or body text is clipped near a cut line; all 9 cells share a unified visual language
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with the following content:
  格1（封面）: 大标题「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」/ 副标题「失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏」/ 视觉元素：柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩，标题突出，排版高级，适合做首图
  格2: 标题「1. 睡前1小时别玩手机」/ 正文「蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。」/ 插画元素：手机、月亮、困倦表情
  格3: 标题「2. 睡前把灯光调暗」/ 正文「暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。」/ 插画元素：床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
  格4: 标题「3. 房间温度别太高」/ 正文「稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。」/ 插画元素：空调、温度计、被子
  格5: 标题「4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡」/ 正文「咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。」/ 插画元素：咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号
  格6: 标题「5. 睡前洗个热水澡」/ 正文「能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。」/ 插画元素：浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
  格7: 标题「6. 脑子停不下来就写下来」/ 正文「把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。」/ 插画元素：笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
  格8: 标题「7. 固定上床时间」/ 正文「每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。」/ 插画元素：时钟、月亮、床
  格9: 标题「8. 试试深呼吸放松法」/ 正文「吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。」/ 底部小字「收藏这组，今晚试试看」/ 插画元素：呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星
Scene/backdrop: needs a sleep-healing 治愈感 atmosphere across all cells — exact background treatment per cell is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, calming night-time atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 奶油白 / 浅米色 / 淡燕麦色 / 浅焦糖色 dominant palette with deep-brown text accents — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a light quasi-material illustration texture with comfortable negative space — exact grain and surface weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as listed per cell above; must include「让你倒头就睡的8个 tips」as the hero headline in 格1; must include「收藏这组，今晚试试看」as small footer text in 格9; all in-image text must be Chinese only, no English, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve strict 3×3 grid structure with visible cell boundaries suitable for post-export cutting; each cell must read independently after cropping; all text must be large, legible, and centered within its cell, not overlapping cut lines; overall layout must feel like a professional 新媒体 editorial design, magazine-quality, 小红书 爆款 aesthetic
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing feel, excessive decoration, English text, garbled characters, text placed near grid cut lines
